text: I know it's likely nothing but I haven't felt right and it's worrying me.
label: non-infectious

text: I haven't been sleeping great and feel a bit run-down.
label: migraine/discharge

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 4 day(s).
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Fever on and off, drenched in sweat, can't get out of bed. This has gone on 3 day(s), and it's escalating — I'm genuinely scared.
label: influenza/mild

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 4 day(s).
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Gasping with each breath, sharp chest pain, high fever, thick productive cough. 9 day(s) now, and it's escalating — I'm genuinely scared.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Terrible. Persistent high fever, severe body aches, dry cough, drenched in sweat. 5 day(s), and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 3 day(s), and I'm getting worse, not better.
label: influenza/mild

text: Terrible. Persistent high fever, severe body aches, dry cough, drenched in sweat. 5 day(s), and I'm deteriorating, I can feel it.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 4 day(s) — nothing terrible yet.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I'm extremely ill — high fever that won't break, severe muscle aches, bad dry cough, completely wiped out. 9 day(s) and getting worse, and it's escalating — I'm genuinely scared.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: I can barely move — high fever, shaking chills, splitting headache, bad cough. 8 day(s) like this, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. My temperature is really elevated.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I can't breathe properly. Severe chest pain, coughing up greenish phlegm, high temperature. 12 day(s) and scared, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Worsening chest cough with thick mucus, feverish, and quite short of breath. 5 day(s), and I'm really worried because it's getting worse.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Productive cough and slightly short of breath climbing stairs. 3 day(s) like this, and it's been the same for a while now.
label: pneumonia/mild

text: I started with a cold but the cough has lingered — a bit of chest tightness too. 2 day(s).
label: pneumonia/mild

text: Fever on and off, drenched in sweat, can't get out of bed. This has gone on 8 day(s), and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. My temperature is really elevated.
label: influenza/mild

text: Slight fever, some body aches, scratchy throat. Probably flu starting, 8 day(s), though it seems to be slowly resolving.
label: influenza/moderate

text: I've had a low-grade fever and achy muscles for 1 day(s) — nothing terrible yet, and it's been the same for a while now.
label: influenza/mild

text: My chest really hurts when I cough or take a deep breath. Quite a bit of phlegm, fever, feeling weak. 7 day(s). I have a very high fever.
label: pneumonia/severe

text: I feel like I'm suffocating. Severe shortness of breath, chest agony, high fever. 10 day(s) like this, and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried. I'm burning up.
label: pneumonia/moderate

text: Sharp pain in my chest when I breathe in, productive cough, fever. Worsened over 19 day(s), and I think I might be very slowly getting better, though I'm still worried.
label: pneumonia/mild
